title: callisia fragrans
intro: Callisia fragrans, also known as the fragrant inch plant or callisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. Native to Central and South America, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Callisia fragrans include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues due to its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Callisia fragrans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and gastrointestinal issues.
